original_abstract: <p><em>This article intent to reveal </em><em>extent</em><em> </em><em>dikili's activity performing that terminological custom tradition/Gorontalo's culture</em><em>.</em><em> </em><em>Assessment did by sosio</em><em>-c</em><em>ultural's approaching passes through search empirik's literature and watch to its performing at any given custom scene about dikili that.</em><em> </em><em>Study result points out that matter-of-fact social and tribal society culture Gorontalo places dikili as something that important and contains religious point in manage society life behaviour.</em><em> </em><em>Islamic aesthetical norms constitute translations symbolically to trusts and grasps to God that most formula deep mirror recitation</em><em>. </em><em>Assess dominant Islamic teaching obeyed by that Gorontalo's islamic community constitute basis source that bear artistry as modikili.</em><em> </em><em>Such thing this is too causative Gorontalo's society really price traditions especially that gets islami's nuance that all along maintained regular and is kept up.</em><em> </em><em>That islami's point was braced motto thru or slogan that becomes Gorontalo's culture reflection that identic with islam which is ‘ adati hula hula’a. to sara’a., sara’a. hula hula’a. to kuru’ani ’ or custom </em><em>based on al Quran (kitab Allah).</em></p>
humanized_abstract: This paper tries to reveal extent of dikili's activity to carry out the activity that is a part of the terminological custom tradition/Gorontalo culture by assessing it through socio cultural approach by doing empirik literature study and also by observing its performance in some occasion of custom of dikili. The result of the study showed that in fact in social and tribal culture of Gorontalo society, dikili is an object that is considered important and having religious character that functions to regulate or control human behavior in the social life. Artistic values or aesthetic norms which consist of modikili are translated into beliefs and understandings of the existence of Allah the Most High where the formula of worship is expressed in a deep mirrour called recitation. As the base reference of the dominant Islamic teaching of Gorontalo's Islamic community, artistry function as modikili is carried out by dikili. Thus, this fact is a causative factor of Gorontalo society's high esteem towards traditions in general and especially Islamic traditions which are always preserved and maintained along with the culture of Gorontalo that is the motto or slogan of Gorontalo culture which is reflected in Islam, that is "adati hula hula’a. to sara’a., sara’a. hula hula’a. to kuru'ani " or customary on the basis of al Quran (Kitab Allah).
